records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...!* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...!* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...!* *Huff...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are too many of them! Where is that damned prince?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are too many of them! Where is that damned prince?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are too many of them! Where is that damned prince?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, chief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, chief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, chief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh, no... The stage for the rite...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh, no... The stage for the rite...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh, no... The stage for the rite...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How. But we only just finished preparing it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: How. But we only just finished preparing it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: How. But we only just finished preparing it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get yourself together. The festival can be held again as long as you stay alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get yourself together. The festival can be held again as long as you stay alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get yourself together. The festival can be held again as long as you stay alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Focus on surviving. You are the chief of this village, are you not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Focus on surviving. You are the chief of this village, are you not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Focus on surviving. You are the chief of this village, are you not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Forgive me. I was acting foolishly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Forgive me. I was acting foolishly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Forgive me. I was acting foolishly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've come to your senses. Now, head to the center of the village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've come to your senses. Now, head to the center of the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've come to your senses. Now, head to the center of the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The surviving villagers should be there too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The surviving villagers should be there too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The surviving villagers should be there too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about you, Saintess?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about you, Saintess?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about you, Saintess?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most beasts come apart when they lose their leader.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most beasts come apart when they lose their leader.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most beasts come apart when they lose their leader.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since we are unsure of when backup will arrive, I will strike the leader before the damage spreads.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since we are unsure of when backup will arrive, I will strike the leader before the damage spreads.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since we are unsure of when backup will arrive, I will strike the leader before the damage spreads.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's reckless! You cannot handle that many monsters alone...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's reckless! You cannot handle that many monsters alone...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's reckless! You cannot handle that many monsters alone...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no one else but me that can stop them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no one else but me that can stop them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no one else but me that can stop them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would bring disgrace to the Savior if I were to flee in this situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would bring disgrace to the Savior if I were to flee in this situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would bring disgrace to the Savior if I were to flee in this situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We all know you did your best, Saintess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We all know you did your best, Saintess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We all know you did your best, Saintess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who would ever fault you for stepping back right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who would ever fault you for stepping back right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who would ever fault you for stepping back right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I cannot accept it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I cannot accept it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I cannot accept it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pardon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pardon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pardon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about me, and go to where your people are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about me, and go to where your people are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about me, and go to where your people are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must be of help to the Savior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must be of help to the Savior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must be of help to the Savior.
